scripts.build: pnpm --filter @memlume/contracts build && pnpm --filter @memlume/database build && pnpm --filter @memlume/shared-brains build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @memlume/contracts build && pnpm --filter @memlume/database build && pnpm --filter @memlume/shared-brains build && vitest run
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @memlume/contracts build && pnpm --filter @memlume/database build && pnpm --filter @memlume/shared-brains build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
